title: coilostylis oerstedii
intro: Coilostylis oerstedii, also known as the "Mountain Mint", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and it is also known to have antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coilostylis oerstedii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat various ailments.
